description_long: This object is a grand piano situated on a raised wooden stage, enclosed on three sides by tall, vertical wooden panels that form an acoustic shell. The piano features a glossy black finish, a full-sized keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and three visible pedals beneath the keyboard. The stage is constructed from rich, dark wood, matching the acoustic shell, and includes a small step at the front for access. The piano is positioned centrally within the shell, which is designed to enhance sound projection. No visible brand or logo is present on the piano, and there is no music stand attached.
description: A grand piano with a glossy black finish sits on a dark wooden stage, surrounded by a tall, three-sided acoustic shell. The piano features a full keyboard and three pedals, with no visible music stand or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the piano's keyboard, three pedals, and the step leading onto the wooden stage, all framed by the acoustic shell.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the tall, vertical wooden panels of the acoustic shell, with the piano barely visible inside.
description_view_2: Direct rear view focusing on the back of the acoustic shell, obscuring the piano almost entirely.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the depth and construction of the wooden shell, with a partial glimpse of the piano inside.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard 88-key layout with alternating white and black keys, no visible missing or non-standard keys.
